title: RMS Loom Band Case Kit
description: Product description Create the most stylish jewellery around with this fabulous Loom Band Case Bracelet Kit by GL Style! Make a range of unique, colourful bracelets and more! With 600 loom bands inside your storage case, you’ll have plenty of bands to work with. Includes: 1 x Plastic Loom Storage Case 1 x Hook 24 x S Clips 600 x Loom Bands Instructions Take your creativity to the next level with this fun-filled kit. Perfect for creating special pieces for yourself, your friends and your family! Safety Warning Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years
